supply_chain_findings.detail: parse-git-config@3.0.0 has known vulnerability GHSA-8g77-54rh-46hx — Prototype Pollution Vulnerability in parse-git-config
webpack@5.94.0 has known vulnerability GHSA-38r7-794h-5758 — webpack buildHttp HttpUriPlugin allowedUris bypass via HTTP redirects → SSRF + cache persistence (fix: >=5.104.0)
webpack@5.94.0 has known vulnerability GHSA-8fgc-7cc6-rx7x — webpack buildHttp: allowedUris allow-list bypass via URL userinfo (@) leading to build-time SSRF behavior (fix: >=5.104.1)
